4. Demonstrate the ability to write a behavioral objective containing

1) a “Do” or “action” statement, 2) a “Condition” statement, and 3) a Criterion statement.

5. Identify how culture and linguistic differences impact the prevention, assessment, and treatment of communication, speech, language, and hearing.
